summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long GLW Daily ETF (GLWG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Corning, Inc. (GLW) stock, less fees and expenses GLWG was launched on Mar 10, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
